extracted.full_content:
Darshit Vishwakarma

Human Resources Executive @ nCube Infosolutions | Human Resources (HR)

🚀 We’re Hiring: Senior Python Developer (Remote | India)
___________________________________________________________________
Are you a passionate Senior Python Developer with 8+ years of experience? Join our dynamic and distributed team and work on cutting-edge backend systems with modern development practices and AI-powered tools!
___________________________________________________________________
🔹 Position: Senior Python Developer
 🔹 Experience: 8+ Years
 🔹 Location: Remote (India)
 🔹 Employment type: Contract
___________________________________________________________________
💡 Role Overview
 We are looking for a highly skilled developer with strong expertise in backend development, APIs, and modern engineering practices. If you enjoy solving complex problems and leveraging AI tools to boost productivity, this role is for you.
___________________________________________________________________
🛠️ Key Responsibilities
 ✔️ Work in an Agile environment with global teams
 ✔️ Collaborate with PMs, Architects, Developers, QA & stakeholders
 ✔️ Design scalable and high-performance backend systems
 ✔️ Build and maintain RESTful APIs
 ✔️ Write clean, maintainable, and testable code
 ✔️ Participate in code reviews and continuous improvement
 ✔️ Use AI tools (like Copilot) to enhance development efficiency
___________________________________________________________________
✅ Required Skills
 🔹 Strong Python expertise (Mandatory)
 🔹 Experience with AI development tools (e.g., Copilot)
 🔹 Hands-on experience with APIs & backend systems
 🔹 Strong knowledge of REST APIs & JSON
 🔹 Experience with Git / Git CLI
 🔹 Familiarity with Agile/Scrum (Azure DevOps preferred)
 🔹 Basic knowledge of Bootstrap
___________________________________________________________________
✨ Good to Have
 ➕ .NET Core / C# experience
 ➕ Docker / Docker Compose
 ➕ Linux (Ubuntu) & Windows CLI
___________________________________________________________________
🤝 Soft Skills
 ✔️ Excellent communication & collaboration
 ✔️ Strong analytical & problem-solving skills
 ✔️ Ability to work in a distributed team
___________________________________________________________________
📩 Apply Now
  Send your resume to darshit@ncubeinfosolutions.com
 or DM +91 73076 21933 for more details

extracted.full_content:
Jayashree kemparaj

Senior Recruiter / Talent Acquisition

🔍 Hiring: LLM / Knowledge Engineers | RAG Experts | AWS Bedrock Timus Consulting Services

We are looking for Senior LLM / Knowledge Engineers to join our team for a 6-month contract (extendible) in Pune, Bangalore, or Gurgaon.

🛠 What You’ll Build:
LLM Abstraction: Build a unified layer (using LiteLLM or AWS Bedrock) to manage model swaps and routing strategies based on cost/latency.
Advanced RAG: Design end-to-end pipelines, from chunking strategies to Hybrid Retrieval (Dense + Sparse/BM25) and Re-ranking.
Vector Mastery: Optimize Vector DBs (OpenSearch, Qdrant, Weaviate) for high-performance retrieval.
Evaluation: Implement automated testing using Ragas, DeepEval, or Langfuse to measure performance.
Prompt Engineering: Develop system prompts, structured output schemas, and use frameworks like DSPy for automated optimization.

📋 The Stack:
LLMs: Claude, GPT-4, Llama, Mistral.
Frameworks: LlamaIndex, LangChain, DSPy.
Cloud: AWS Bedrock, Python (FastAPI/Async).
Data: Vector DBs, OpenSearch, Apache Iceberg/Delta Lake.

📍 The Details:
Experience: 3+ Years (Senior Engineers).
Duration: 6 Months (Extendible).
Shift: General Shift (IST).
Budget: Open to quote based on experience!

📩 Ready to optimize the future?
Send your CV to: 📧 jayashree.kemparaj@timusconsulting.com

(Note: BGV, Experience Certs, and Education docs will be required.)
Tag a RAG wizard who knows the difference between Dense and Sparse retrieval! 👇
#Hiring #LLM #RAG #KnowledgeEngineering #AI #AWSBedrock #Python #PuneJobs #BangaloreJobs #GurgaonJobs #TechJobs

Kiran Kumar Kaleshe

Talent Acquisition Head | BDE

BrezQ Hiring: Generative AI Engineer (Python) | Remote | India

We are looking for a Generative AI Engineer with strong Python expertise to build and scale cutting-edge AI solutions.

📌 Role Details:
Position: Generative AI Engineer (Python)
Experience: 5+ Years
Location: India
Work Mode: Remote
Contract: 1 Year

💡 What You’ll Do:
1. Design and deploy Generative AI solutions using LLMs like GPT-4, LLaMA
2. Build scalable backend systems and APIs
3. Work on prompt engineering and AI optimization
4. Collaborate with cross-functional teams

🔧 Key Skills:
1. Python (Strong hands-on)
2. LLMs (GPT-4, Claude, etc.)
3. FastAPI / Flask, REST APIs
4. NLP & Transformer models
5. Vector DBs & embeddings
6. Cloud: Microsoft Azure
7. Git, Docker, CI/CD

📩 Interested candidates, please share your resume at Kiran@brezq.com or reach out directly.

#Hiring #GenerativeAI #PythonJobs #LLM #AIJobs #RemoteJobs #IndiaHiring #Azure #FastAPI #NLP

Consultant Ophthalmologist | Healthcare Innovator |Phaco & Oculoplasty | Founder ASVOUT BIOTECH & Re.Vision | Building MyoProtect | IIM Bangalore Incubatee| NSRCEL

Hiring: Full-Stack Developer (AI-Native) — Contract to Full-Time | Early-Stage Startup

We’re building something ambitious and tackling a complex, real-world problem.

We’re looking for a Full-Stack Developer who is fluent in AI-assisted development (Claude Code, Copilots, cloud IDEs) and comfortable operating in a fast-moving, early-stage environment.

---

What You’ll Work On

- Build end-to-end systems across frontend, backend, and database  
- Design intuitive, high-quality UI/UX for real-world workflows  
- Architect scalable systems using MongoDB / Firebase  
- Leverage AI-native development workflows to accelerate shipping  
- Structure and manage messy, real-world data  
- Collaborate closely with founders on product, tech, and execution  

---

Core Requirements

- Strong full-stack experience (React / Node / APIs)  
- Solid understanding of UI/UX principles  
- Experience with MongoDB, Firebase  
- Comfortable using AI coding tools (Claude Code, Copilot, etc.)  
- High ownership mindset and adaptability  
- Ability to handle ambiguity, rapid iteration, and evolving priorities  

---

Bonus (High Leverage)

- AI/ML exposure:
  - Python (NumPy, Pandas)  
  - Basic model building / data workflows  
- Strong data structuring and data engineering skills  
- Experience working with complex datasets  

---

Engagement

- 3-month contract  
- Conversion to full-time based on performance  
- Compensation: aligned with capability and ownership  

---

Who This Is For

Builders who:

- Thrive in early-stage chaos  
- Think in systems, not tasks  
- Use AI as leverage, not a crutch  

---

Apply with:

- GitHub / portfolio  
- End-to-end projects  
- Any AI/data work  

📩 Email: drrajubarman3393@gmail.com  

We’re not hiring coders. We’re hiring builders who can adapt and create in uncertainty.

extracted.full_content:
Thivya Nisha s

HR Executive | Talent Acquisition | Payroll & Statutory Compliance | Employee Engagement

Agentic AI Developer (India)
Remote
Contract for 1 Year+Extendable
Budget: 1LPM

Building the Future of Autonomous Healthcare Systems

About Us
We are building a category-defining Agentic AI platform focused on transforming healthcare outcomes across Medicare Advantage and value-based care.
Our mission is to deploy autonomous AI agents that directly improve clinical, financial, and operational performance for payers and providers.
Role Overview
As an Agentic AI Developer, you will design and deploy autonomous AI systems capable of reasoning, planning, and executing complex workflows.
You will work on real-world healthcare problems such as risk adjustment, prior authorization, and care gap closure.
What You’ll Build
* Multi-agent systems (planner, executor, verifier architectures)
* AI workflows for risk adjustment, prior authorization, and provider engagement
* RAG pipelines and tool-using LLM systems
* Scalable AI infrastructure using cloud-native architectures
Core Responsibilities
* Design and implement agentic architectures
* Build LLM-powered applications with high accuracy and reliability
* Integrate healthcare data (FHIR, HL7, claims)
* Develop evaluation and feedback loops for continuous improvement
Required Qualifications
* Strong Python and system design skills
* Experience with LLMs, APIs, and distributed systems
* Understanding of prompt engineering and RAG pipelines
Preferred Qualifications
* Experience with agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)
* Healthcare experience (Medicare Advantage, HCC coding)
* Exposure to real-world AI deployment and scaling
Success Metrics (6–12 Months)
* Deploy production-grade AI agents
* Achieve 15–30% improvement in workflow efficiency
* Demonstrate measurable ROI in healthcare workflows
Compensation & Benefits
* Competitive salary (top quartile for AI talent in India)
* Meaningful ESOP ownership
* Performance-linked bonuses tied to product and ROI outcomes 
📩 focusedjobhr@gmail.com

 ⭐ Name: Thivya Nisha

 ⭐Mobile No: 63741 38601 (Strictly No Calls, Only Whatsapp )
